gigapan.description:
Taking Gigapan portraits at Arse Electronika.  In a back room working on the issues of lighting and backgrounds and composition and how do you get people to hold 'the right amount' still while the images are being taken.

I did a number of test shots with a wider angle lens, and I accidentally included them in the first stitch, and there were an even multiple of the number of rows in the 'real' gigapan, so here you go...
